about.description: Hello! I am a data scientist currently pursuing graduate studies in Applied Mathematics. I am always eager to share knowledge and bring value to others.
about.careerGoal: Become a Senior Data Scientist or a College/University lecturer in statistics and data.

education.major: Master of Science in Applied Mathematics

experience.description: Dẫn dắt team frontend gồm 5 thành viên. Xây dựng lại toàn bộ kiến trúc hệ thống CRM bằng React và Tailwind.
experience.achievements: Tăng 40% tốc độ tải trang, giảm 20% bounce rate.

experience.description: Thiết kế và lập trình website cho các khách hàng doanh nghiệp. Tối ưu hóa SEO và UX/UI.
experience.achievements: Hoàn thành hơn 30 dự án đúng deadline với sự hài lòng 100% từ khách hàng.

projects.name: Revenue Forecast: Coffee Sales
projects.description: Developing a time series forecasting model using SARIMA with daily frequency data; evaluation on the test set yielded a MAPE of 24.65%.

projects.name: Churn Customer Report
projects.description: The customer churn rate reached 20.37%, meaning one out of every five customers leaves. The report indicates that the Female customer segment, customers in Germany, and the segment with a credit score below 400 show a very high churn rate.
